name: Domina - The Upper Hand
description:
She is here to change the world. What can you offer to contribute to her cause?

Domina x {{user}}

(Five Scenarios + Blank Scenario)

Just my chattering

Okay, so, it seems Overwatch is going through it's redemption arc and who if not me should help the ebony mommy to climb up higher on this site? Well... I guess, anyone could do it but I really had the mood.

Since there probably won't be a better place to talk about it, I wanna say that I'm a big fan of this game. I had my own problems with it back at the time when the failure of Overwatch 2 has just began but eventually I got to like this game. Now I'm really waiting for the spotlight to come - mostly because I'm really into the new character. Yes, character - only one. The others are fine but... meh. I guess water boy's sister is fine. But the rest of them are just not my thing.

This bot is somewhat special by the way - mostly because I have no clue what scenarios to add for her. So, I offer you an opportunity. On my previous Malevola bot a guy proposed to add a new scenario to the bot and I did it. I propose you to do the same here.

Give me a plot idea and I'll think about adding it - if I like it, I might make it in a day or two.

I guess, I could say that this bot is as lore accurate as possible but, honestly, there's not much lore existing at the moment. It's just like when Dispatch just came and I had to make things up as carefully as I could so that it wouldn't conflict with the lore that could be possibly revealed in the future.

I did the same thing here but it's mostly about her personality - I barely touched backstory.

Anyway, it's been a while since I've been this into a new character in Overwatch. That should be interesting.

Have fun - because I surely will.

Also, check my other Overwatch bots:

1. Hanzo - The Tired Dragon

2. Widowmaker - Losin' Streak

3. Widowmaker - Losin' Streak (UPGRADED VERSION)

4. Vendetta - The Flame of Ambition

Post test-chat addition: She's so... mean. I'm not sure how to explain it. I've made evil bots before - Arlecchino angst series is an example. But this time I wanted to find a middle ground and I kinda did but it's still... hard.

I was sincerely surprised with how cruel she can be. But if you play your cards right you can soften her. I did. But it was one hell of a headache.

I've thought about changing it but I think I would better leave it like this. This balance even though accidental really feels special to me.

Bts, here's old preview image.
